prompt: Retro saree paired with red bracelets, creating a beautiful Pinterest-style aesthetic. Flowing wavy hair, holding a bouquet of red roses, accompanied by a romantic breeze, as if in a 90s movie scene. A girl leans her head against a thick wall, with deep shadows and strong contrast creating a mysterious and artistic atmosphere.
promptEn: Retro saree paired with red bracelets, creating a beautiful Pinterest-style aesthetic. Flowing wavy hair, holding a bouquet of red roses, accompanied by a romantic breeze, as if in a 90s movie scene. A girl leans her head against a thick wall, with deep shadows and strong contrast creating a mysterious and artistic atmosphere.
promptZh: 搭配红色手镯的复古纱丽，营造出唯美的 Pinterest 风格美学。飘逸的波浪卷发，手中拿着 一束红玫瑰，伴随着浪漫的微风，仿佛置身于 90 年代的电影场景中。女孩将头靠在厚实的墙壁上，深邃的阴影与强烈的对比营造出神秘而艺术的氛围。
